classification.meaning: the chosen coordinate twist is directional data not determined by scalar Gaussian curvature K alone

compute.method: exact SymPy two-coordinate sqrt(-g) Weyl-squared action-density expansion

jacobi_operator: -2*(4*K*F(theta)**2*y(r)*Derivative(u(r), (r, 2)) + 4*K*F(theta)**2*Derivative(u(r), r)*Derivative(y(r), r) - 3*F(theta)**2*y(r)**2*Derivative(u(r), (r, 4)) - 2*F(theta)**2*y(r)*Derivative(u(r), r)*Derivative(y(r), (r, 3)) - 8*F(theta)**2*y(r)*Derivative(u(r), (r, 2))*Derivative(y(r), (r, 2)) - 12*F(theta)**2*y(r)*Derivative(u(r), (r, 3))*Derivative(y(r), r) - 2*F(theta)**2*Derivative(u(r), r)*Derivative(y(r), r)*Derivative(y(r), (r, 2)) - 6*F(theta)**2*Derivative(u(r), (r, 2))*Derivative(y(r), r)**2 + 27*y(r)*Derivative(F(theta), theta)**2*Derivative(u(r), (r, 2)) + 27*Derivative(F(theta), theta)**2*Derivative(u(r), r)*Derivative(y(r), r))*F(theta)/3
